examples: Furthermore, in the early days of longline fishing, a lot of fish were lost to sharks after they had been hooked.
Conservationists say longline gear also damages corals and other important habitat on the sea bottom, threatening both the turtles and the fish.
He says he quit when he saw dolphins, caught accidentally on longline hooks, being dragged aboard ship, beaten to death, and thrown back into the sea.
He is sitting in the half-darkness of his workshop, tying hooks on a longline.
One of the deadliest threats to their survival is longline fishing, which claims around 40, 000 sea turtles annually.
